name: Preserving Garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. Keep a large bag of whole garlic in a cool, dark place.
2. For extra portions, peel garlic cloves and place them in a jar with oil, then refrigerate.
- This makes flavorful oil for cooking.
3. Alternatively, you can freeze peeled garlic or even frozen whole bulbs (though they may become slightly opaque when thawed).
4. Frozen garlic retains its flavor well and can be used regularly in cooking.
